qa_pairs.question: What topics are addressed in the SHARCNET webinar titled 'Migrating to the upgraded national systems'?
qa_pairs.answer: The webinar covers how the upgrade will affect user workflow, job scheduling, and file systems in the new clusters. It also addresses how to best utilize the increased computing capacity of the upgraded clusters, particularly concerning computing nodes having many more CPU cores per node. Additionally, it details the most significant changes to GPU computing.

qa_pairs.question: According to the 'Migrating to the upgraded national systems' webinar, what is the most significant change occurring in the upgraded national computing systems?
qa_pairs.answer: The 'Migrating to the upgraded national systems' webinar highlights that the most significant change in the upgraded national computing systems will be in the way GPU computing is performed, and this topic is covered in detail during the session.
